title: The Police Interview
learningGoal: The learner will rapidly decode auditory arrays of irregular simple past tense verbs within a high-stress conversational context, identifying sequential events in a timeline.
instructions: Listen to a police officer interviewing a woman about a crime she saw yesterday. Because everything happened in the past, almost every action word is a rule-breaker (Irregular)! Listen closely for words like 'saw', 'ran', and 'went'. Answer the 8 questions.

contentItems.text: The woman is nervous, so you need to pay close attention to her timeline. What happened first? What happened next?

listeningGoal: Extract specific events and sequences encoded in irregular simple past tense verbs.
audioScenario: A witness is describing a thief who stole a bag at the park.

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Please calm down, madam. Tell me, what happened yesterday?
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: प्लीज़ काम डाउन, मैडम। टेल मी, वॉट हैपनड यस्टरडे?
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: कृपया शांत हो जाइए, मैडम। मुझे बताइए, कल क्या हुआ?

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: I went to the park at five o'clock. I sat on a bench and I ate an apple.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: आई वेंट टू द पार्क एट फाइव ओ'क्लॉक। आई सैट ऑन अ बेंच एंड आई एट ऐन ऐपल।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: मैं पाँच बजे पार्क में गई। मैं एक बेंच पर बैठी और मैंने एक सेब खाया।

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Okay. And what did you see?
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ओके। एंड वॉट डिड यू सी?
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: ठीक है। और आपने क्या देखा?

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: I saw a tall man. He wore a fast, red coat.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: आई सॉ अ टॉल मैन। ही वोर अ फास्ट, रेड कोट।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: मैंने एक लंबा आदमी देखा। उसने एक तेज़ (चमकीला), लाल कोट पहना था।

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: He walked to an old woman. She had a blue bag.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ही वाक्ड टू ऐन ओल्ड वुमन। शी हैड अ ब्लू बैग।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: वह एक बूढ़ी औरत के पास चलकर गया। उसके पास एक नीला बैग था।

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: No, he did not talk. He took her blue bag! Then, he ran away.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: नो, ही डिड नॉट टॉक। ही टुक हर ब्लू बैग! देन, ही रैन अवे।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: नहीं, उसने बात नहीं की। उसने उसका नीला बैग लिया! फिर, वह भाग गया।

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: He ran to the street. He jumped into a black car.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ही रैन टू द स्ट्रीट। ही जम्प्ट इनटु अ ब्लैक कार।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: वह सड़क की ओर भागा। वह एक काली कार में कूद गया।

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Yes! The car went very fast. The poor woman cried.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: येस! द कार वेंट वेरी फास्ट। द पुअर वुमन क्राइड।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: हाँ! कार बहुत तेज़ी से चली गई। बेचारी औरत रोई।

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Thank you, madam. This is very good information.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: थैंक यू, मैडम। दिस इज़ वेरी गुड इनफार्मेशन।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: धन्यवाद, मैडम। यह बहुत अच्छी जानकारी है।

audioTranscriptFull:
Woman: Officer, I saw everything!
Officer: Please calm down, madam. Tell me, what happened yesterday?
Woman: I went to the park at five o'clock. I sat on a bench and I ate an apple.
Officer: Okay. And what did you see?
Woman: I saw a tall man. He wore a red coat.
Officer: What did the man do?
Woman: He walked to an old woman. She had a blue bag.
Officer: Did he talk to her?
Woman: No, he did not talk. He took her blue bag! Then, he ran away.
Officer: Where did he go?
Woman: He ran to the street. He jumped into a black car.
Officer: And then the car left?
Woman: Yes! The car went very fast. The poor woman cried.
Officer: Thank you, madam. This is very good information.

questionSet.questionText: What time did the woman go to the park?
What did the witness eat while sitting on the bench?
What word did she use to say 'मैंने देखा' a tall man?
What color was the coat the man wore?
The man walked to an old woman. What color was the old woman's bag?
Did the man talk to the old woman?
What word did she use to say the man 'लिया' (took) the bag?
The man ran to the street. Where did he jump into?

scoringRules.partialCreditRules: No partial credit for Q1, Q3, Q4, Q6, Q7.

feedbackRules.onPass: Astounding! You were able to track all the rapid, irregular past events perfectly.
feedbackRules.onFail: Keep trying! Ensure you playback the audio on Slow mode. Listen specifically for 'Saw' (Past of see), 'Took' (Past of take), and 'Ran' (Past of run).
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good ear! Watch out for the trick questions about the verbs. You never say 'He taked' in English. The past of Take is 'Took'!

audioAssets.audioTranscript: Woman: Officer, I saw everything!... (matches full transcript)

hintText: If you hear an action word that you don't recognize, it might be an irregular past verb. Example: 'wore' is the past of 'wear'.
commonMistakes: Misinterpreting 'saw' as the tool used for cutting wood, instead of the past tense of 'see'.
